description:
Model a flat-roofed commercial building and install a tilted solar array using Skelion in SketchUp Make 2017.

1. Draw a rectangular building footprint approximately 15m x 25m on the ground.
2. Extrude (Push/Pull) the building to a height of 6 meters.
3. Select the flat roof face.
4. Open the Skelion plugin and configure the panel settings:
   - Orientation: Landscape
   - Panel Width: 2000 mm
   - Panel Height: 1000 mm
   - Tilt angle: 15 degrees
   - Azimuth: 180 degrees (South)
   - Row spacing: 2000 mm (2.0 m)
5. Insert the solar panels onto the roof.
6. Orbit the camera so the tilted panels and row spacing are clearly visible.
7. Save the completed model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\flat_roof_commercial.skp'.
